creator: syko@virus.sykotik.org
text:
Netgear network interface cards on the isa bus are not supported by FreeBSD
netgear pci nics are supported (they're given the dev name pn[0-9])

Fix: 

Someone ought to write some support for these, I'd really like to see it.  Thanks.
How-To-Repeat: put a netgear isa nic in your machine :)
